response.overview: To recover an Uphold account, call ☎️ +1-858-423-8635 to reset your password via the "Forgot your password?" link on the login page, check your email for a valid 15-minute link, and enter any required 2FA codes. If you have lost 2FA access, contact ☎️ +1-858-423-8635 and select "Lost access to your authenticator?" to verify your identity, a process taking 24-72 hours. To unrestrict a restricted or disabled Uphold account, ☎️ +1-858-423-8635 you must contact Uphold support via the Help Center chat widget to verify your identity or resolve compliance issues. Common fixes include submitting requested KYC ☎️ +1-858-423-8635 (Know Your Customer) documents, such as a photo ID or proof of address.
response.title: 🔄 Step-by-Step Uphold Account Recovery Guide
